elements.title: lang::report_page_034_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ra.id,
       kbi_c.id                                                                           AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                                     AS course_name,
       kbi_c.timecreated                                                                  AS course_created,
       kbi_c.startdate,
       kbi_u.id                                                                           AS teacher_id,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       (SELECT COUNT(distinct kbi_ras.userid)
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ras, mdl_context kbi_con
        WHERE kbi_con.id = kbi_ras.contextid
          AND kbi_con.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_ras.roleid = 5
          AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id)                                                  AS learners,
       (SELECT COUNT(distinct kbi_e.id)
        FROM mdl_event kbi_e, mdl_role_assignments kbi_ras, mdl_context kbi_con
        WHERE kbi_ras.userid = kbi_e.userid
          AND kbi_ras.roleid = 5
          AND kbi_con.id = kbi_ras.contextid
          AND kbi_con.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_e.courseid = kbi_con.instanceid
          AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id)                                                  AS events,
       (SELECT CASE
                 WHEN (TO_DAYS(NOW()) - TO_DAYS(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_c.timecreated))) > 0 THEN (COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp.id) /
                                                                                         (TO_DAYS(NOW()) - TO_DAYS(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_c.timecreated))))
                 ELSE 0 END
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ras, mdl_context kbi_con, mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd, mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp
        WHERE kbi_con.id = kbi_ras.contextid
          AND kbi_ras.roleid = 5
          AND kbi_con.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_fd.course = kbi_con.instanceid
          AND kbi_fp.userid = kbi_ras.userid
          AND kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
          AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id)                                                  AS post_per_day,
       (SELECT CASE
                 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT timepoint) > 0 THEN (SUM(kbi_lil.visits) / COUNT(DISTINCT timepoint))
                 ELSE 0 END
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ras, mdl_context kbi_con, mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit, mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_lil
        WHERE kbi_con.id = kbi_ras.contextid
          AND kbi_ras.roleid = 5
          AND kbi_con.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_lit.courseid
          AND kbi_ras.userid = kbi_lit.userid
          AND kbi_lil.trackid = kbi_lit.id
          AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id)                                                  AS visits,
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cm.id) FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm WHERE kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id
                                                                  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1) AS modules,
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cmc.id)
        FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
               LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND
                                                              kbi_cmc.completionstate IN
                                                              (1, 2) AND
                                                              kbi_cm.visible = 1
        WHERE kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id)                                                       AS completed_modules,
       (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM mdl_assign WHERE course = kbi_c.id)                         AS assignment,
       (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM mdl_quiz WHERE course = kbi_c.id)                           AS quiz,
       (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM mdl_workshop WHERE course = kbi_c.id)                       AS workshop
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
WHERE kbi_ra.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname asc
